title: SawnTimber
description: SawnTimber: Structural material of standard construction Timber to be used on structural elements and properties, or as a fragment of the physical material.

Name.description: A unique name is required for some structural packages to create and identify the object.

Density.description: Mean Density. Used to calculate mass. Called ρmean in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Density measured in [kg/m³].

DensityCharacteristic.description: Characteristic Density. Used to calculate other mechanical properties (not mass). Called ρk in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Density measured in [kg/m³].

DampingRatio.description: Dynamic Damping Ratio. Ratio between actual damping and critical damping. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

YoungsModulus.description:
Modulus Of Elasticity of the material to be used for Analysis. Ratio between stress and strain in all directions.
Values can be automatically populated based on material parameters by calling the SetAnalysisParameters method.
Vector defines stiffnesses as follows:
X - Stiffness along the local x-axis of the element (Ex). For most cases this will be the parallel stiffness.
Y - Stiffness along the local y-axis of the element (Ey). For most cases this will be the perpendicular stiffness.
Z - Stiffness along the local z-axis of the element (Ez). For most cases this will be the perpendicular stiffness. Property has a quantity of type YoungsModulus measured in [Pa]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

ShearModulus.description:
Shear Modulus or Modulus of Rigidity of the material to be used for Analysis. Ratio between shear stress and shear strain.
Values can be automatically populated based on material parameters by calling the SetAnalysisParameters method.
Vector components defined as:
X - Shear Modulus in the local xy-plane (Gxy).
Y - Shear Modulus in the local yz-plane (Gyz), generally referred to as rolling shear.
Z - Shear Modulus in the local zx-plane (Gzx). Property has a quantity of type ShearModulus measured in [Pa]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

PoissonsRatio.description:
Poisson's Ratio. Ratio between axial and transverse strain. Typically taken as 0.4 for X and Y component (νxy and νyz) and as 0.4*E_90/E_0 for the Z component, though value varies depending on timber species.
Vector components made up of:
X - Poisson's ratio for strain in the local y direction generated by unit strain in x direction (νxy). Generally strain in perpendicular direction caused by strain in longitudinal direction.
Y - Poisson's ratio for strain in the local z direction generated by unit strain in y direction (νyz). Generally strain in perpendicular direction caused by strain in other perpendicular direction.
Z - Poisson's ratio for strain in the local x direction generated by unit strain in z direction (νzx). Generally strain in longitudinal direction caused by strain in perpendicular direction. Note that this value generally is significantly lower than values for the other two components. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

ThermalExpansionCoeff.description:
Thermal Expansion Coefficeint. Strain induced in the material per unit change of temperature. Typically taken as 5x10^-6 in all directions, though value varies depending on timber species and grain orientation.
Vector defines stiffnesses as follows:
X - Thermal expansion along the local x-axis of the element (αx).
Y - Thermal expansion along the local y-axis of the element (αy).
Z - Thermal expansion along the local z-axis of the element (αz). Property has a quantity of type ThermalExpansionCoefficient measured in [1/K]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

E_0_Mean.description: Mean modulus of elasticity parallel bending, Em,0,mean in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type YoungsModulus measured in [Pa].

E_0_k.description: 5 percentile modulus of elasticity parallel bending, Em,0,k in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type YoungsModulus measured in [Pa].

E_90_Mean.description: Mean modulus of elasticity perpendicular, Em,90,mean in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type YoungsModulus measured in [Pa].

G_Mean.description: Mean shear modulus, G,mean in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type ShearModulus measured in [Pa].

BendingStrength.description: Characteristic Bending Strength. Normal stress parallel to the grain at failure in bending as calculated from beam equations. Called f_mk in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

TensileStrengthParallel.description: Characteristic Tensile parallel Strength. Tensile stress parallel to the grain at failure in net tension. Called  f_t0k in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

TensileStrengthPerpendicular.description: Characteristic Tensile perpendicular Strength. Tensile stress perpendicular to the grain at failure in net tension. Called f_t90k in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

CompressiveStrengthParallel.description: Characteristic Compressive parallel Strength. Compressive stress parallel to the grain at failure in net compression. Called f_c0k in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

CompressiveStrengthPerpendicular.description: Characteristic Compressive perpendicular Strength. Compressive stress perpendicular to the grain at failure in net compression. Called f_c90k in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

ShearStrength.description: Characteristic Shear Strength. Shear stress parallel to the grain at failure in net shear, i.e. shear relevant to beam bending. Called f_vk in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
